title: Progressive deploy — from Dockerfile to Compose
description: Build a two-service web stack step by step. Each guided step is immediately followed by an autonomous task — you must complete it before the next guided step works.

steps.title: Step 1B — Build the backend image (your turn)
Step 2A — Add persistence to the backend (guided)
Step 2B — Add persistence to the frontend (your turn)
Step 3A — Connect the frontend to a network (guided)
Step 3B — Connect the backend to the same network (your turn)
Step 4B — Add healthcheck and depends_on (your turn)
